title: Career and recruitment support from MHA
lead: Self-service is the default. When you need a person, MHA consultants are here to help candidates and employers alike.
explainer: Submit a request and an MHA consultant will follow up. There is no live chat — we respond thoughtfully rather than instantly.

form.title: Request support
form.name: Your name
form.phoneHint: Optional. Add a number if you'd prefer a call back.
form.messageHint: Optional. Share any detail that helps us respond well.
form.resumeHint: Optional. PDF or DOCX, up to 5 MB.
form.privacyNotice: We use your details only to respond to this request. Resumes are kept private and never shared without your application.

response.title: What to expect
response.body: An MHA consultant typically follows up within two business days. Urgent items are prioritised.

success.title: Request received
success.body: Thank you. An MHA consultant will follow up by email.
